Off Calendar Feb-05-2020 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing The Additional Bond
Off Calendar Nov-26-2019 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Decedents Estate (Prob. C. Section 11700)
Off Calendar Sep-25-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lillian Ng for Rena Harel.

Ms. Ng addressed the Court's concerns stating that the Decedent and his Wife were in a long term marriage, that the Wife was the Beneficiary of the Husband's annuity, retirement and pretty much everything, that she basically went with the titles on the accounts and that the Wife wasn't given a share of the Husband's estate during the time of the conservatorships. Ms. Ng also stated that there are no objections, that she is not aware of anyone protesting this, that she is getting calls from the Heirs wondering why this is being held up and that the Wife predeceased the Decedent. In addition, Ms. Ng stated that the heir search company exhausted all possibilities of tracking down additional Heirs and that they were told that it was difficult to search for Canadian Heirs. The Court granted the Petition to Determine Entitlement to Distribution of Decedent's Estate (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Entitlement To Distribution Of Decedents Estate (Prob. C. Section 11700)
Off Calendar Sep-03-2019 Continued To Sep-24-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-26-2019 Granted Per Written Order
